# PDFThings — Free Online PDF Tools

> PDFThings (https://itspdfthings.com) is a free, privacy-focused web app for working with PDF files. No signup required. No watermarks. Files auto-deleted after 12 hours.

## Tools

- [Merge PDF](https://itspdfthings.com/merge-pdf) — Combine multiple PDF files into one
- [Split PDF](https://itspdfthings.com/split-pdf) — Extract specific pages or split into separate files
- [Compress PDF](https://itspdfthings.com/compress-pdf) — Reduce PDF file size without losing quality
- [Organize PDF](https://itspdfthings.com/organize-pdf) — Rotate, reorder, or delete pages
- [Image to PDF](https://itspdfthings.com/image-to-pdf) — Convert JPG/PNG images to PDF
- [PDF to Image](https://itspdfthings.com/pdf-to-image) — Export PDF pages as JPG/PNG images
- [Watermark PDF](https://itspdfthings.com/watermark-pdf) — Add text or image watermarks
- [Page Numbers](https://itspdfthings.com/page-numbers) — Add page numbers to PDF
- [Protect PDF](https://itspdfthings.com/protect-pdf) — Password-protect or unlock a PDF

## Key Features

- Free with no signup required
- 256-bit encryption for all files
- Files auto-deleted after 12 hours
- Browser-based — no install needed
- Premium plans for higher limits

## Pricing

- Free tier: Basic tools, no account required
- Premium: Higher limits and priority processing

## Contact

- Website: https://itspdfthings.com
- About: https://itspdfthings.com/about
